name: current turn clue anchors new pressure thread

source.purpose: When a reveal creates pressure, current-turn floating evidence should attach to the new thread immediately.

narrator.prose: Fresh sealant around the hatch shows the cargo was staged tonight through a side-access bypass.

payload.title: Hatch staged tonight

payload.title: Deliver the Data Core to Dead-Drop
